Package de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy

Class FOLStrategy

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.StaticFeatureCollection
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.AbstractFeatureStrategy
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.FOLStrategy
All Implemented Interfaces:
ComponentStrategy, Strategy<Goal>, Named, Feature
Direct Known Subclasses:
JFOLStrategy
public class FOLStrategy extends AbstractFeatureStrategy implements ComponentStrategy

    • isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal

      public boolean isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal()
      Description copied from interface: Strategy
      Checks if the Strategy should stop at the first non-closeable Strategy.
      Specified by:
      isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal in interface Strategy<Goal>
      Returns:
      true stop, false continue on other Strategys.

    • isApprovedApp

      public boolean isApprovedApp(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pio, Goal goal)
      Description copied from interface: Strategy
      Re-Evaluate a RuleApp. This method is called immediately before a rule is really applied
      Specified by:
      isApprovedApp in interface Strategy<Goal>
      Returns:
      true iff the rule should be applied, false otherwise

    • name

      public Name name()
      Specified by:
      name in interface Named

    • computeCost

      public <GOAL extends ProofGoal<@NonNull GOAL>> RuleAppCost computeCost(@NonNull RuleApp app, @NonNull PosInOccurrence pio, @NonNull GOAL goal, @NonNull MutableState mState)
      Evaluate the cost of a RuleApp.
      Specified by:
      computeCost in interface Feature
      Parameters:
      app - rule application
      pio - corresponding PosInOccurrence
      goal - corresponding goal
      mState - the MutableState to query for information like current value of TermBuffers or ChoicePoints
      Returns:
      the cost of the rule application expressed as a RuleAppCost object. TopRuleAppCost.INSTANCE indicates that the rule shall not be applied at all (it is discarded by the strategy).

    • setupFormulaNormalisation
